visual_summary: An expansive, engineered landscape consisting of vast cultivated tracts situated between the polar ice caps and major population centers. The terrain is defined by rhythmic patterns of highly refined biological life and organized vegetation, supported by an advanced irrigation network featuring subterranean water conduits and pipes.
layout_notes: Expansive horizons with a network of underground irrigation systems and structured farmlands.
lighting: Open sky under a bright Martian sun.
constraints: Must maintain the scale of vast planetary vistas
Must reflect an organized, non-wild landscape
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific botanical species or types of "refined" life are not defined.
Exact spatial relationship/distance between ice caps and population centers is unspecified.
